top_signals.title: How Bitcoin ETFs Changed Institutional Adoption
top_signals.summary: A spot bitcoin ETF is a fund that holds actual bitcoin and trades on a stock exchange, so an investor gains exposure to bitcoin’s price through an ordinary brokerage account. When the first U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs began trading in January 2024, they removed the custody, compliance, and operational barriers that had kept many asset […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Sees Record Profit as Stock-Trading Climbs 86%
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan Chase reported its highest quarterly profit ever as the second-quarter equities haul climbed 86% from a year earlier to $6.03 billion. Gerard Cassidy, head of US bank strategy and large-cap bank analyst at RBC examines the results on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)
